summary: Comprehensive testing of international expansion features. Backend APIs all working correctly (25/25 tests passed). Frontend /rehab-centers page displays treatment centers with filters and pagination working. One bug found: search by name doesn't work because frontend uses wrong API endpoint.

minor.issue: US treatment centers missing country_code field - data inconsistency with international centers

ui_bugs.issue: Search by center name doesn't work - frontend uses treatmentCentersApi.getAll() which calls /api/treatment-centers endpoint that doesn't support 'q' parameter. Should use treatmentCentersApi.search() which calls /api/treatment-centers/search

action_items: Fix RehabCenters.tsx to use treatmentCentersApi.search() when searchQuery is present instead of treatmentCentersApi.getAll()
Consider adding country_code='USA' to existing US treatment centers for data consistency
critical_code_review_comments: RehabCenters.tsx line 69: Uses getAll() for all queries including search - should conditionally use search() when q parameter is present

success_rate.frontend: 90% (search not working, filters and pagination work)

seed_data_creation: International data already seeded: 20 countries, 140 statistics records (7 years each), 104 treatment centers (84 US + 20 international)
context_for_next_testing_agent: International expansion APIs fully tested. /api/countries returns 20 countries, /api/countries/USA returns country with statistics, /api/global/statistics returns aggregated stats, /api/treatment-centers supports country_code and treatment_type filters, /api/treatment-centers/search supports q parameter for name search, /api/pages/{slug} returns CMS content with defaults. Frontend /rehab-centers page works except search functionality.

api_countries.details: Returns 20 countries with regions, flags, population

api_countries_by_code.details: Returns country details with latest_statistics, available_years, treatment_centers_count

api_country_statistics.details: Returns 7 years of statistics (2019-2025) with verified sources

api_global_statistics.details: Returns aggregated stats across 20 countries, top 10 countries, data sources

api_treatment_centers.details: Returns 104 centers with country_code and treatment_type filters working

api_treatment_centers_search.details: Search by name (q parameter) works correctly

api_cms_pages.details: Returns default content for about-us, privacy-policy, terms-of-service

frontend_rehab_centers_page.details: Page loads with 104 centers, country filter works, treatment type filter works, pagination works. Search by name NOT working.

frontend_country_filter.details: Dropdown shows 9 countries (AUS, CAN, DEU, ESP, GBR, MEX, NLD, THA, ZAF), filtering works correctly

frontend_treatment_type_filter.details: Dropdown shows all treatment types, filtering by Luxury shows 3 centers correctly

frontend_pagination.details: Pagination controls work, different centers shown on each page

frontend_search.details: Search input present but doesn't filter results - uses wrong API endpoint
